briefing_text:

Business: Marathon Deli

Health Score: 72/100
6 recommendations | $20,869 total impact

pulse_summary:
PULSE BRIEFING — Tuesday Apr 28, 11:16 PM

⚠️ TODAY: $2988.36 earned, $2988.36 projected vs $3000.0 target
   Behind by $11.64 — push a promo or prep for late night surge
⚠️ THIS WEEK: $6014.55 earned, $10261.52 projected vs $18000.0 target

🚨 ANOMALY: Revenue is 63.5% off expected pattern — investigate immediately

⏰ PREDICTED RUSH WINDOWS (next 72hrs):
   Wed Apr 29 10:00 PM - 12:00 AM — $721.27 expected [HIGH]
   Thu Apr 30 10:00 PM - 12:00 AM — $721.27 expected [HIGH]
   Fri May 01 10:00 PM - 12:00 AM — $721.27 expected [HIGH]

reviews.author: Alex T.
reviews.original_review: Waited 40 min for a gyro at 11pm, cashier was rude, food was cold.
reviews.draft_reply: Hi Alex, we sincerely apologize — this is not our standard. We are reviewing Friday late-night coverage and retraining front-of-house staff immediately. Please DM us for a full refund.

reviews.author: Sara K.
reviews.original_review: Fatima made the best shawarma I have ever had. I drive 20 min just for this.
reviews.draft_reply: Thank you Sara! Fatima is truly one of a kind — we will pass along your kind words directly.

reviews.author: Marcus B.
reviews.original_review: DoorDash order arrived 25 minutes late and fries were soggy.
reviews.draft_reply: Marcus, late delivery is unacceptable — we are addressing the DoorDash dispatch window. Here is a $5 credit for your next order.

employee_feedback.frank_briefing_line: Fatima Hassan is this week star — customers drive 20min for her shawarma. Daniel Brooks needs retraining before next health inspection.

warnings.message: Working overtime this week — review hours with manager.
warnings.message_to_employee: Hey Michael — you are at 45hrs this week. Let us adjust next week schedule to keep you at 40.

warnings.message: Health-code concern on record — retraining required.
warnings.message_to_employee: Daniel — mandatory food safety retraining is scheduled for this Thursday 2PM. Attendance required before your next shift.

warnings.message: Punctuality flagged — please check Friday schedule.
warnings.message_to_employee: Jordan — you have had 3 late Friday arrivals this month. DoorDash on-time rate matters for our rating. Can we adjust your Friday start time?
